title: 9PCS Damaged Screw Extractor Set, Hardness 63-65HRC, Upgraded Model HSS 6542, Removal Tool, Adult Gifts for Men, General Bit Set Double Ended for Damaged Broken Stripped Screws
features: 【Hardness 63-65HRC】The screw extractor is made of high hardness HSS 6542, which has excellent high hardness, good abrasion resistance and toughness compared with the HSS 4341 model in the market, it is not easy to break or deform in use and prolongs the service life of the tool.
【Powerful】Stripped screw extractor removes even the most stubborn stripped, damaged, embedded, rusted and painted-over screws and bolts.Meet the needs of various maintenance scenarios.

【Comprehensive Model Coverage】The 6 pcs screw extractor comes in 5 models #0, #1, #2, #2, #3, #4 to accommodate different sizes and types of screw heads, whether it's for small, delicate electronic devices or screws on large machinery and equipment, you'll find the right extractor.

【Efficient twist drill design】Comes with three sizes of carbide twist drills, designed for screws that are difficult to screw out directly, destroying the structure of the screw by drilling and easily removing broken heads or badly rusted screws.

【New Choice For Men'S Holiday Gift】Choose this damaged screw extractor set as a holiday gift, whether it's Thanksgiving, Christmas, Father's Day, or a birthday party, it can be the perfect choice to convey love and care.

【Quality Service】Each screw extractior set comes with a sturdy plastic case, easy to carry and store. Meanwhile, we provide 3 months quality after-sales. If you have any quality problem, please contact us for replacement, we will solve the problem for you as soon as possible.
【Contact information】Your Account→Your Orders→Sold by：mizhiaheng→Ask a question. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Is the 6542 screw extractor prone to damage and breakage ? Adopting one-piece forging process, the thickness of key parts is increased by 2.3mm, and the alloy steel of 6542 has a hardness of HRC63-65. Built-in stress dispersal structure prevents breakage even when dealing with completely rusted screws. Why does the screw extractor keep slipping when you use it ? 1.Corroded/Greasy Screw Heads: First clean threads with WD-40 or toothpaste. 2.Incorrect Tool Angle: Maintain 28° alignment between extractor and screw. 3.Insufficient Downward Force: Apply 4-5kg pressure. What is the emergency treatment when the screwdriver is slipping ? 1. Apply pencil lead powder: 5 strokes with a HB pencil on the tip of the knife 2. Lightly turn 15° counterclockwise: Continue operation when you hear a ‘click’ 3. Wrap the rubber band: half a turn around the tip of the blade to increase the friction How to prevent the screw extractor from slipping in an oily environment ? 1. Pre-treatment: Paste the masking tape on the occlusal surface. 2. Technique: pause for 1 second every half turn to allow the tape to reapply. 3. End of operation: Clean the cutter head by wiping with alcohol pads. Does the 6542 Screw Remover work with all sizes of screws ? Yes! The 6542 Screw Extractor is available in 5 size sets covering a range of screws from M2 to M12 for different scenarios. The sheet metal screws are too tight. Easily removes the tight screws from the steel frame without effort or damage to the material. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
